visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand behind a shopping cart in a crowded Costco warehouse environment. One woman wears a blue beret and a light-colored jacket, while the other has long dark hair and wears a white top under a black strap dress. They both smile and wave at the camera. Large yellow and red text overlays cover the screen. (2) The scene shifts to a rapid montage of various products displayed on warehouse shelves. These include stacks of Charmin toilet paper, packages of sliced pork, and boxes of sanitary pads. Each shot is centrally framed and includes large, bright text boxes indicating price drops and specific dates. (3) The montage continues with close-up shots of snacks like pea crackers, egg rolls, and chocolate pies. The lighting is bright and industrial, characteristic of a large retail store. Background details include other shoppers and metal shelving units. (4) The final sequence showcases various beverages, frozen seafood, and household items like socks and storage bags. Each product is presented clearly for about one to two seconds before cutting to the next item, maintaining a consistent framing style for each product category.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators at the start, at least 10 other shoppers visible in the background throughout the store.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a dark blue beret and a light denim-style jacket; the other has long straight black hair and wears a white layered top with black straps.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial metal shelving units stacked high with boxed inventory, and bright fluorescent lighting. Many shoppers with carts are visible in the aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice begins shouting an introduction over an upbeat, synthesized comedic track. The music has a steady four-on-the-floor beat. A prominent 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition. (2) The narrator speaks at an extremely fast rate, listing off product names and their discounted prices. Each sentence ends with a rising inflection. A 'pop' or 'ding' sound effect coincides with the start of each new product mention. (3) The background music remains continuous and repetitive, providing a consistent energy level. The voice quality is clear and professional, though intentionally exaggerated for comedic effect. No ambient store noise is audible through the master mix. (4) The audio cuts remain extremely rapid, matching the fast-paced visual montage. The voice-to-music ratio is high, with the narration clearly sitting at the front of the mix. The energy level remains at peak intensity until the recording concludes with a final energetic phrase.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a rapid-fire promotional guide for weekly discounts at Costco in Taiwan. It uses a high-energy 'speed-run' style to capture the viewer's attention and deliver a large amount of information about food, beverage, and household sales in a very short time frame.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products with price tags, discounts, and calls to follow the channel for more deals.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a very common social media format for retail promotions, characterized by extremely fast editing and high-intensity narration to maintain high retention.
